response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, with notable strengths in JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. However, his C++ experience is limited to early roles involving C and C++ components for National Instruments, which does not align closely with the required 8-12 years of focused C++ development for industrial automation. Additionally, his lack of direct experience with secure coding practices, IEC 62443 standards, or industrial cybersecurity raises concerns about his fit for this role. His expertise in cloud platforms (AWS) and frontend technologies is not directly relevant to the job's requirements.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience with JavaScript/TypeScript and Node.js
Proven ability to build scalable, high-performance systems (e.g., micro-services handling millions of requests per second)
Demonstrated expertise in agile methodologies, TDD, and CI/CD pipelines
concerns: Limited C++ experience (only early roles with C/C++ for National Instruments)
No direct experience with IEC 62443 industrial cybersecurity standards or secure development lifecycle (SDL)
No apparent experience with industrial automation protocols (Modbus TCP/IP, OPC UA, etc.) or IoT applications
